evals.name: state-block-generation
evals.prompt: Generate a UPMv2-STATE block for a project with 3 tasks: T1 (completed), T2 (in_progress), T3 (pending). Project: 'refactor-api'. Overall completion: 33%.
expectations: State block must start with UPMv2-STATE marker
State block must include all 3 task IDs
Block must be enclosed in code fence or structured block for machine parsing

evals.name: incremental-update
evals.prompt: Incrementally update the existing UPMv2-STATE block: mark T3 as completed, add new task T6 as pending. Do NOT overwrite the entire block — only update changed fields.
expectations: T3 should be updated to completed; existing T1, T2 must be preserved
New task T6 must appear in the updated state block
Output should indicate incremental update, not full rewrite
Percentage should reflect 3 completed out of 6 total = 50%
